dialogueChunks.intro: Please, {player_name}. Since {quest_origin}, {quest_threat_the} {quest_threat_has} made life unbearable. We have nowhere else to turn.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We need someone to {quest_action} at {quest_focus_the}. There should be {quest_item} {location_hint} that could help. We need as much of it as you can carry back. Without those supplies, {quest_stakes_human_the} will suffer.
dialogueChunks.outro: I know it is a lot to ask. But we are running out of time.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, thank the stars you are here. {quest_threat_The} {quest_threat_has} been claiming more of us each day, and we cannot hold on much longer.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We traced the problem back to {quest_focus_the}, but we lack the means to fix it. We desperately need someone to gather {quest_item} found {location_hint}. {quest_ally} says we need a good supply of it to have any chance.
dialogueChunks.outro: Please, {quest_stakes_the} cannot wait. We need this done before {quest_time_pressure}.

dialogueChunks.intro: Stranger, I have no pride left. {player_name}, {quest_threat_animate_the} {quest_threat_animate_has} been terrorizing {quest_focus_the} and we are powerless to stop it.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Someone needs to {quest_action} before we lose everything. The {enemy_type_plural} have been sighted {location_hint}. Kill enough of them and we might stand a chance.
dialogueChunks.outro: If {quest_stakes_the} {quest_stakes_is} taken, this settlement is finished. I will give you {quest_reward_hint} if you help us.
